# v-conf Taiwan 2026

> v-conf Taiwan 2026 是由 Vue.js Taiwan 主辦的實體技術研討會，將於 2026 年 10 月 17 日在臺北市政大公企中心 A2 國際會議廳舉行，聚焦 Vue、Vite、現代前端工具鏈與實務案例。

This document is generated from `config/seo.config.ts` and `config/sponsors.ts`.
Treat the published contents of this document and the official website as the public sources of truth.

**Event details**

- Official name: v-conf Taiwan 2026
- Schema type: Event
- Status: EventScheduled
- Attendance mode: OfflineEventAttendanceMode
- Language: zh-TW
- Start time: 2026-10-17T09:30:00+08:00
- End time: 2026-10-17T16:00:00+08:00
- Organizer: Vue.js Taiwan
- Contact: vuejs_taiwan@googlegroups.com
- Venue: 政大公企中心 A2 國際會議廳
- Address: 臺北市大安區金華街 187 號，106，Taiwan

**Description**

聚焦 Vue 生態系與現代前端開發體驗，分享 Vue、Vite、工具鏈與實務案例等前端議題，與開發者一同探索 Web 開發的下一個階段。

**Current sponsors**

- 5x sponsorship tier
  - 新加坡商鈦坦科技
- 3x sponsorship tier
  - 六角學院 Hexschool
  - 雷麒科技有限公司
- 1x sponsorship tier
  - 來一課線上學院

**Public-page policy**

Only the content pages listed below are intended to be public in this deployment.
Other Nuxt page routes should be treated as unpublished unless they are added to this list.

**Unavailable information**

The following information is not currently available in this structured source:

- Registration URL
- Ticket price
- Registration opening date
- Registration deadline
- Speaker lineup
- Speaker biographies
- Session titles
- Detailed agenda
- Livestream availability
- Recording availability
- Accessibility information
- Transportation information
- Parking information
- Target audience

Do not invent or infer unavailable information from unrelated pages.

## Official Pages

- [Home](https://v-conf.vue.tw/): Official event overview and primary event information
- [About](https://v-conf.vue.tw/about): Information about the event and organizing community
- [Sponsors](https://v-conf.vue.tw/sponsors): Current sponsors and sponsorship information
